content: Remote OK Virtual Assistant Torentify <p>Virtual Assistant (Remote)</p><p>About the Company</p><p>ZEUS THERMAL, Inc. is seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support daily business operations. This opportunity is ideal for a highly organized professional who enjoys administrative work, managing multiple tasks, and contributing to the efficiency of a growing organization while working remotely.</p><p>About the Role</p><p>As a Virtual Assistant, you will provide essential administrative support to help ensure smooth day-to-day operations. You will be responsible for managing communications, scheduling, data entry, file organization, and assisting with various business-related tasks. This role requires strong organizational skills, excellent communication abilities, and the capability to work independently in a remote environment.</p><p>Responsibilities</p><ul><li>Manage and organize email communications.</li><li>Schedule appointments, meetings, and calendar events.</li><li>Perform accurate data entry and maintain records.</li><li>Organize and manage digital files and documents.</li><li>Assist with daily administrative and operational tasks.</li><li>Coordinate information and communications between team members as needed.</li><li>Maintain confidentiality of company information and records.</li><li>Support additional projects and business activities as assigned.</li></ul><p>Qualifications</p><ul><li>High school diploma or equivalent required.</li><li>Previous experience in an administrative, virtual assistant, or support role preferred.</li><li>Strong organizational and time-management skills.</li><li>Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks effectively.</li><li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li><li>Proficiency with computer applications and online collaboration tools.</li><li>Strong attention to detail and accuracy.</li></ul><p>Skills</p><ul><li>Administrative support</li><li>Calendar management</li><li>Email management</li><li>Data entry</li><li>File and document organization</li><li>Time management</li><li>Communication skills</li><li>Attention to detail</li><li>Multitasking</li><li>Problem-solving</li><li>Microsoft Office and online productivity tools</li><li>Remote collaboration</li></ul><p>Benefits</p><ul><li>Fully remote work opportunity.</li><li>Flexible and independent work environment.</li><li>Opportunity to contribute to a growing organization.</li><li>Professional development and skill-building opportunities.</li><li>Collaborative and supportive team culture.</li></ul><p>Equal Employment Opportunity Statement</p><p>ZEUS THERMAL, Inc. is an Equal Opportunity Employer and is committed to creating an inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic under applicable law.</p> project manager, exec, virtual assistant Katy, Katy, Texas, United States 2026-06-23T14:27:29+00:00 1133970 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-virtual-assistant-torentify-1133970 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png MSK Physiotherapist Virtual IPRS Health <strong>Salary</strong>: 33,000-37,000 (based on full-time, 40 hours per week and is non-negotiable).<br><br><strong>Location</strong>: REMOTE. Must be based and working within the United Kingdom.<br><br><strong>Job Type</strong>: Permanent<br><br><strong>Hours</strong>: Minimum of 20 hours, maximum 40 hours Monday-Friday<br><br><strong>Working Pattern</strong>: Flexible - Between 08:00 and 20:00 Monday to Friday. Weekend work unavailable.<br><br><strong>Experience: </strong> Must be an HCPC-registered Physiotherapist with a minimum of 3 years postgraduate working experience and working experience of UK healthcare system<br><br><strong>Please note that we are unable to offer any visa sponsorship opportunities for this role at the current time.<br><br></strong><strong>Who are IPRS Health?<br><br></strong>IPRS Health are an award-winning provider of MSK and Mental Health Services, putting patients at the heart of everything we do, ensuring a smooth and successful journey to recovery. We work for a diverse range of clients with our services having a significant impact into improving the lives of thousands of people every year.<br><br>Originally solely a provider for just physiotherapy, today IPRS Health is regarded as one of the UK's leading providers of quality corporate absence management services including:<br><br><ul><li>Physiotherapy</li><li>CBT</li><li>Counselling</li><li>Workplace Services</li><li>Workshops<br><br></li></ul>We take pride in our innovative approach, combining traditional treatments with new innovative methods to improve our patient's experience and results, whilst helping keep costs down for our clients.<br><br>IPRS Health has an extensive in-house team of multidisciplinary clinicians which, coupled with our carefully selected and managed national clinical network, can provide a first-class service, throughout the UK.<br><br>We are seeking an HCPCregistered Physiotherapist with at least three years of postgraduate clinical experience, including proven practice within UK healthcare settings.<br><br><strong>Physio Roles<br><br></strong>Are you an MSK Physiotherapist looking to take your career in a new direction? Do you want to work for a Company that will give you the time and resources to deliver quality, patient-centred care? IPRS Health are a leading provider of health and wellbeing services. Our business is growing, and we have exciting opportunities to join our Virtual Physiotherapy Service, working with corporate clients and Occupational Health providers to assess and treat patients. This is a remote role, giving you the flexibility of working from home. Full training will be provided in our virtual and digital platforms which will support you in providing high quality care to your patients.<br><br>We are looking for HCPC Registered Physiotherapists who are enthusiastic and keen to apply their MSK skills in a unique environment. You do not need to have worked remotely before as full training will be given and all IT equipment is provided by the company.<br><br><strong>The Role<br><br></strong>As <strong><em>a Virtual Physiotherapist </em></strong>for IPRS Health You will undertake virtual assessments of MSK patients and signpost to appropriate treatment pathways. You will also manage your own caseload of MSK patients, delivering virtual physiotherapy using our digital platforms.<br><br>IPRS Health has an excellent record of accomplishment in delivering superb clinical outcomes to our clients and supporting patients to return to work. We offer ongoing support and training including clinical mentorship, Company-wide In-service Training, full access to the Physiopedia CPD training platform, and an annual CPD allowance.<br><b
